zh.lifeSummary: 當William Drew於1627年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親William Drew29歲，母親Mrs Nancy Drew23歲。他於1647年與Elizabeth Matthews在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆也格斯波特被列為fisherman。他去世於1669年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德達勒姆奧易斯特 利維享年42歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德達勒姆德魯 加里森 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Drew于1627年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲William Drew29岁，母亲Mrs Nancy Drew23岁。他于1647年与Elizabeth Matthews在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆也格斯波特被列为fisherman。他去世于1669年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德達勒姆奧易斯特 利維享年42岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德達勒姆德魯 加里森 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Drury  .

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen on memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When William Drew was born in 1627, in Devon, England, his father, William Drew, was 29 and his mother, Mrs Nancy Drew, was 23. He married Elizabeth Matthews in 1647, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as fisherman in Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States. He died on 16 April 1669, in Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Drew est né en 1627, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Drew, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nancy Drew, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Matthews en 1647, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est fisherman à Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1669, à Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Drew 1627 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Drew 29 und seine Mutter Mrs Nancy Drew 23. Er hat 1647 in New Hampshire, British Colonial America Elizabeth Matthews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als fisherman in Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. April 1669 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Drew è nato il nel 1627 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, William Drew, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Nancy Drew, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Matthews nel 1647, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come fisherman nel Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 16 aprile 1669, nel Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーピスカタクア
ja.Isle of Sholes, Portsmouth, New Hampshir: アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムポルトスモウス

ja.lifeSummary: William Drewが1627年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William Drewは29歳，母Mrs Nancy Drewは23歳であった。1647年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアでElizabeth Matthewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムリゴスプオルトでの職業はfishermanと記録されている。彼は1669年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードダルハムオイスター リバーで42歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードダルハムドリュー ガーリソン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Ham: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람 이스터 라이버
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Straffor: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 뒤람 드루 개리슨 세멧리
ko.Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 피스카타퀄
ko.lifeSummary: William Drew(이)가 1627년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Drew(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Nancy Drew(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1647년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 Elizabeth Matthews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 리 고스포트에서 fisherman이었다. 그는 1669년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람 이스터 라이버에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 뒤람 드루 개리슨 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Drew nasceu em 1627, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Drew, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nancy Drew, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Matthews em 1647, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como fisherman em Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1669, em Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Drew родился в 1627 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Drew было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nancy Drew, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Matthews в 1647 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии fisherman в местности госпорт, ри, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 16 апреля 1669 г. в местности оистир ривир, дурам, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности дрю гаррисон кеметири, дурам, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Drew nació en 1627, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Drew, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mrs Nancy Drew, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Matthews en 1647, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era fisherman en Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Murió el 16 de abril de 1669, en Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Drew Garrison Cemetery, Durham, Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
